howItWorks.intro: This percentage calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: % Change
rules.explanation: Percentage increase or decrease from original.

howItWorks.outro: Tax laws and financial markets change frequently. Verify current rates with your financial institution.

faq.a: (New - Old) / Old × 100 gives percentage increase or decrease.

faq.q: What is the difference between change and difference?
faq.a: Change is relative (%), difference is absolute (same unit as the values).

howWeCalculate.intro: This percentage calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs

Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.

whenToUse.intro: This percentage calculator is designed for anyone who needs quick, reliable estimates.
scenarios: When you need a quick estimate before committing to a purchase or project
When comparing different options or scenarios side by side
When planning a budget and need to understand potential costs
When you want to verify a quote or estimate you've received
When teaching or learning about the concepts behind these calculations
